taskTitle: Learn the seven conditions of the Shahada (Ilm, Yaqin, Qabul, Inqiyad, Sidq, Ikhlas, Muhabbah)
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Ikhlas (Sincerity) — for Allah alone' under the parent task 'Learn the seven conditions of the Shahada (Ilm, Yaqin, Qabul, Inqiyad, Sidq, Ikhlas, Muhabbah)' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: Identify primary Quranic verses, specifically Al-Bayyinah 98:5 and Az-Zumar 39:2, 11, 14, that establish the obligation of worshipping Allah with absolute sincerity (Ikhlas) as the essential condition of the Shahada.

Retrieve Sahih hadith from Bukhari and Muslim, notably the narration regarding the person who testifies to the Shahada "sincerely from his heart" (*mukhlisan min qalbihi*), to anchor the necessity of Ikhlas in the acceptance of faith.
